_meta.description: Delete a group from YeshID. Navigates to the group detail page and triggers the delete/archive action.

group_name.description: Name of the group to delete

_meta.warning: Destructive action — permanently deletes the group. Members are NOT deleted, only the group record.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
anomalies: Delete action is likely in a group-detail page action menu (Manage, kebab ⋮, or Settings)
YeshID may use 'Archive' instead of 'Delete' — check perceive output for actual button text
Confirmation dialog likely uses group name as a type-to-confirm field

chain.note: Click target group to open group detail page
Perceive group detail. Look for: 'Delete', 'Archive', 'Manage' dropdown, kebab menu (⋮), or settings icon.
Click Delete Group. Fallbacks: 'Archive Group', 'Delete', 'Remove Group'.
Perceive confirmation dialog. Check if type-to-confirm input exists.
Confirm deletion. Fallbacks: 'Confirm', 'Archive', 'Yes'. If type-to-confirm required, use type action on input first.
Verify redirect to groups list and group no longer appears.
